html:
THE VENDETTA GAZETTE

Special Edition • March 30, 2026 • "All the Blood That's Fit to Print"

TITANS UNLEASH FRESH HELL AS EMPEROR'S EMPIRE CRUMBLES TO DUST!

Hold onto your Tommy guns, citizens of our blood-soaked metropolis! The twin terrors of Vendetta City have struck again with renewed vengeance, as Wu-Tang "The Iron Fist of the East Side" and the immaculately murderous Sir Caprice have carved up another 224 territories between them in seven days of systematic slaughter!

Our Oriental overlord Wu-Tang seized 118 fresh turfs for the second consecutive week, proving his appetite for territorial domination knows no bounds! The Iron Fist's relentless war machine conducted a staggering 89 separate raids, maintaining his position as the most feared name whispered in Vendetta City's darkest alleys.

Not to be outdone in this dance of death, Sir Caprice claimed 106 pristine territories while orchestrating 80 precision strikes with his trademark surgical savagery. The gap between these titans remains tantalizingly narrow, with street-corner bookmakers taking heavy action on when their inevitable confrontation will paint the pavement crimson!

But the week's most spectacular collapse belongs once again to the hemorrhaging FIFTH BLOOD EMPEROR, who watched another 52 precious territories slip through his crimson fingers! This imperial catastrophe suffered a biblical 54 separate raids, transforming his once-mighty kingdom into little more than Swiss cheese served on a silver platter to hungrier predators.

SPECIAL BULLETIN: HEADQUARTERS HOLOCAUST CONTINUES!

The most spine-tingling spectacle of systematic destruction reached new heights as our terrible twosome delivered a combined 30 headquarters captures this week! Sir Caprice's educational enterprise claimed the scalps of Hazel, aba, SaminKz, Humblejay, grom95, the mighty Qbert, and Dine99 – while Wu-Tang's iron-fisted enforcers added 37, My hit song, and Thematrix to their ever-growing trophy collection!

That's right, dear readers – Wit__cher!! has vanished entirely from our fair city's criminal landscape, taking 13 territories to his grave!

The political powerhouse Donald Trump emerged as this week's dark horse, that golden-haired gladiator seizing an impressive 73 gleaming territories while conducting 59 strategic strikes. Our sources whisper that the Donald's expanding empire now poses a serious threat to the established order!

Meanwhile, the sun-kissed Vacation Brothers continue their inexorable climb, though their tropical expansion has slowed to a more leisurely pace. Vacation Albert claimed 11 fresh turfs, while his bronzed brother Vacation Steve managed just 9 territories – though Steve proved his devastating potential by destroying 8 enemy headquarters without claiming the ground, a feat of pure intimidation!

QBERT'S EMPIRE CRUMBLES UNDER SYSTEMATIC SIEGE

In scenes reminiscent of the great territorial wars of '24, the once-formidable Qbert watched his criminal kingdom collapse in spectacular fashion, hemorrhaging 43 territories while enduring 53 separate raids! The former power player's dramatic downfall culminated with Sir Caprice's enforcers storming his very headquarters, delivering the coup de grâce to what was once a respectable criminal enterprise.

Not far behind in this week's parade of the vanquished, Lakhhe lost 37 precious turfs after suffering through 44 raids from every direction, proving once again that in Vendetta City, yesterday's hunter becomes tomorrow's hunted!

POLICE BLOTTER

• Vacation Bob spotted teaching henchmen proper beach volleyball technique during territorial expansion – authorities baffled by effectiveness of "spike and seize" strategy.

• Blood Captain's enforcers reportedly paused mid-raid to help elderly woman cross street – witnesses confirm Tommy guns were properly holstered during good deed.

• Twenty-seven small-time operators vanished this week, leaving behind only empty speakeasies and unpaid protection money – janitors throughout the city report unusually quiet workweek.
